title: Bestway Play Paddling Pool | Inflatable Garden Pool for Toddlers and Kids, 1.02 m x 25 cm, Ages 2+, Assorted Colours
description: From the manufacturer Features Designed to get kids splashing, moving, and out of the house, The Bestway Play Pool puts the focus back on fun. The Play Pool measures 1.02 m x 25 cm and is quality-tested for good. It was created for children ages 2+ with three equal rings for stability, making it the good pool for little ones. Setup is quick and easy, so someone and someoner child can spend more time enjoying summer together. It's the good size for a garden or sm patio and can be easily stored for more seasons of playtime fun. Splashing in the sun has never been more effortless or more enjoyable than with the Bestway Play Pool.
